name: SPORTEX
tagline:
Premium outdoor resort wear.
Designed in Nanjing. Made for the world.
taglineZh:
高端户外度假服饰。
南京设计，服务全球。
description: SPORTEX was founded in Nanjing with a clear mission: to create premium outdoor resort wear that blends performance technology with effortless style. We source only the finest lightweight fabrics — our signature 100% polyester at 105 g/m² delivers unmatched breathability and packability. Every garment meets rigorous AATCC standards for UV protection and antibacterial performance, so you can focus on the adventure. From sun-drenched coastlines to mountain trails, SPORTEX keeps you protected, comfortable, and looking sharp.
descriptionZh: SPORTEX 创立于南京，使命明确：打造兼具高性能技术与轻松风格的高端户外度假服饰。我们精选最优质的超轻面料——标志性的 100% 涤纶 105 g/m² 带来无与伦比的透气性与便携性。每件服装均达到严格的 AATCC 紫外线防护和抗菌性能标准，让您专注于探险。从阳光海岸到山间小径，SPORTEX 为您提供保护、舒适与型格。
mission: To deliver premium outdoor resort wear that combines innovative fabric technology, responsible manufacturing, and timeless design — empowering our global partners to succeed in the outdoor apparel market.
missionZh: 提供融合创新面料科技、负责任制造与永恒设计的高端户外度假服饰，助力全球合作伙伴在户外服装市场取得成功。
